name: LA PUERTA FALSA, Bogota - La Candelaria - Restaurant Reviews
snippet: The signature Ajiaco dish is very filling. Service is really quick here but get here early as thre was a queue when we left. Prices are fair for the area.

snippet: Eat at La Puerta Falsa. Whether you have the soup, the tamal, or a merely a hot chocolate, you won't regret the experience.

snippet: There is only one type of tamale at La Puerta Falsa – chicken leg and pork fat in a creamy rice and corn meal mixture.
